fields.message: Allow to use this fund for those who are in need.

fields.name: CARA
fields.description: Compassion and Responsibility for Animals ù dedicated to animal welfare in the Philippines

fields.name: Caritas Manila
fields.description: Catholic charitable organization serving the poorest communities in Metro Manila

fields.name: ChildHope PH
fields.description: Empowering street children and urban poor youth through education and community programs

fields.name: Save the Children
fields.description: Global nonprofit protecting children and ensuring their right to health, education, and safety

fields.name: World Vision
fields.description: International humanitarian organization focused on child welfare, emergency relief, and community development

fields.name: Gawad Kalinga
fields.description: Nation-building movement fighting poverty through community development and housing programs

fields.name: Green Earth
fields.description: Environmental conservation and sustainability advocacy organization

fields.name: Haribon Foundation
fields.description: Pioneering Philippine biodiversity conservation through science-based advocacy and community engagement
